## SESSION\_ID\_PATTERN variable

Pattern for valid session IDs Format: YYYY-MM-DD-HHMMSS-\[0-9a-f\]<!-- -->{<!-- -->8<!-- -->} Example: "2026-01-15-143025-a1b2c3d4"

**Signature:**

```typescript
SESSION_ID_PATTERN: RegExp
```
